name: Untitled Andrew Sodroski Inspired by Philadelphia's Main Line Murders
original_name: Untitled Andrew Sodroski Inspired by Philadelphia's Main Line Murders
overview: June 25, 1979: Susan Reinert, English teacher, brutally murdered in Philadelphia's affluent Main Line area. Her body was found in a car trunk. Her children remained missing, sparking public outcry and exposing flaws in the justice system.
